column_description: the unique identifier of the transaction
the id of the customer who made the transaction

value_description:
commonsense evidence:
The amount is in the customer's base currency. Large amounts may trigger additional scrutiny.

column_description: the date and time of the transaction
the name of the other party in the transaction
value_description: Name of the person or entity on the other side of the transaction

column_description: the channel through which transaction was made
whether the transaction was flagged as suspicious
value_description:
commonsense evidence:
1 means the transaction was flagged for review, 0 means normal transaction.

column_description: the id of the alert if transaction was flagged
value_description:
Maps to alert(id)
NULL if not flagged
Optional notes or descriptions about the transaction
